registryDoctrine: Every escalation entry projects a governance-attested human escalation target into the role-adapter code path. Adding an entry requires (1) attestedBy userId, (2) attestedAt ISO-8601 timestamp, (3) role label, (4) scope (universal | industry | jurisdiction | company), (5) a stable contactRef (email or governance handle), (6) a founder-authored commit. Cursor and AI workers MUST NOT append entries. The starter entry below is the universal founder fallback — every more specific entry overrides it for the matching scope.
selectionDoctrine: Adapter selects the most specific matching entry: company > jurisdiction > industry > universal. If multiple entries tie on specificity, the most recently attested wins. If no entry matches, the adapter returns outcome=fail_closed.

entries.notes: Universal founder fallback. Catch-all escalation target for any framework disambiguation conflict not covered by a more specific entry. Wiseman Financial Technologies LLC founder of record.
